# Meeting note (personal, fixture)

Fixture for the advisory (PII) tier of the pre-archive secret gate.
All values below are canonical fake examples, not real personal data.

Follow up with Jane Doe, reachable at jane.doe@example.org, about the
onboarding paperwork.

Her US Social Security number form listed 078-05-1120 (the classic
Woolworth specimen number used in documentation).

German tax office letter references Steuer-ID 12 345 678 901 for the
sample case in the handbook.
